lines: Ube maso, Mukristo: Nturuhuke nonaha, Amakub'ari hafi; Usabe !
Ababisha b'lmana Bajya bakwubikira, Baguciriy' ibico; Usabe !
Ujye wambar’ intwaro yesu yakwihereye. Ku manywa 'na n’ijoro, Wirinde !
Umv' abatsinze kera lyo ntambar' urwana; Baraguhugura, ngo : Usabe !
Umva n'Umwami wawe, Yesu wagupfiriye, Ni We watubwiy' ati ; Ba maso!
Iryo jamb'uryemere N'umutima wizeye, Kugira ng' urikore; Usabe !
